General.Name: Gamehaus Holdings Inc. Class A Ordinary Shares
General.Description: Gamehaus Holdings Inc., a technology-driven mobile game publishing company, distributes mobile games created by its developer partners across gaming markets in the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, Germany, France, Canada, Brazil, Japan, India and internationally. It also engages in sales of virtual items associated with mobile games, as well as advertisements within the mobile games. Gamehaus Holdings Inc. is based in Shanghai, China.
